Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to output a DuckDB SQL query that filters cases with 6 events

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Use subquery to compute counts per case_id then join or use IN

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Probably something like WITH case_counts AS SELECT case_id COUNT AS cnt FROM event_log GROUP BY case_id

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: SELECT e FROM event_log e JOIN case_counts c ON e case_id equals c case_id WHERE c cnt <= 6 ORDER BY e case_id e timestamp
